title: Square Glass Vase 25cm, Modern Thickened Hand-Blown Crystal Clear Flower Vase for Minimalist Home Decor, Wedding Centerpieces & Office Table Arrangements
features: Modern Square Vase: This square glass vase features a modern 8x8x25cm design, offering a stable base for lush floral arrangements. Its geometric shape and crystal-clear transparency make it the perfect modern centerpiece for any home decor, enhancing everything from grand bouquets to simple greenery.

Premium Handmade & Thickened Glass: As a decorative flower vase of superior quality, it is handmade from clear glass with a thickened bottom for enhanced durability. The smooth, polished rim ensures it's safe to handle and easy to clean, making this sturdy vase a lasting piece of home decor.

Versatile Home & Wedding Centerpiece: Elevate your space with this versatile home decor essential. The square vase serves as an elegant wedding centerpiece or a stunning table decoration for dining tables and window sills. It beautifully displays fresh flowers, dried pampas, or branches, adding a minimalist touch to any room.

Endless Versatility for Any Occasion: Unleash your creativity! This vase is ideal not only for daily home decor but also for special events. Create stunning wedding centerpieces, elevate restaurant table settings, or add a natural touch to your office desk. Its square shape provides a contemporary edge compared to traditional round vases.

The Perfect Gift: Beautifully presented and packed with care, this vase arrives gift-ready. It is the perfect, thoughtful present for housewarmings, birthdays, Mother's Day, or Christmas. Simply add a beautiful bouquet to create a cherished and impressive gift for your loved ones.
description: Product Description Glass Vases Tall Clear Square Flower Vase Floral Arrangement Vase Modern Ornaments for Centerpieces Wedding Party Home Decor Accessories Our square glass vases come in four sizes, 40*12cm, 30*10cm, 25*8cm and 20*8cm. You can order the corresponding size vase according to your needs. Each vase consists of thick glass with a flat base that is so strong and stable that it can be placed firmly on a table without falling. The clear glass ensures that your arrangement will be the star of the show, while the minimalist design keeps the focus on your flowers. This is the perfect choice to display in your living room or family room and brings a stylish vibe to your home decor. Hand-blown glass that makes each piece unique How to Care: Prior to first use, glass pieces should be hand washed individually in warm soapy water, rinsed thoroughly and dried with a lint free cloth. For optimal finish & clarity, clean with a 50/50 solution of vinegar and water, let stand for a few hours then rinse well and dry with a lint free cloth. all vases should be cleaned before use to remove any accumulated dust dirt. Glass vases are individually blown and hand finished by skilled artisans. Air bubbles and imperfections may exist due to the glass being hand-blown. This is a normal and acceptable phenomenon in the handmade process. Minimalist squared design for a modern aesthetic The clear glass vase can be used on its own for great decor. Or you can use it as floral container and add in with fresh florals, dried flowers, bouquets, foliage, water and other vase fillers for beautiful display. The large square glass vase adopts transparent color design, looks elegant and simple, applying it to decorate your home or wedding party, can better attract people's attention.
